description_long: This is a classic chessboard set on a square wooden platform with a distinct, natural wood grain pattern visible along the border. The playing surface features a standard grid of alternating black and white squares, sharply defined and evenly spaced. The chessboard is populated with a full set of chess pieces in two contrasting colors: one set in a light ivory tone and the other in a deep black, each with traditional Staunton-style detailing. The pieces are arranged in their starting positions, with pawns in the front row and the major pieces behind. The border of the board is slightly raised and finished in a darker wood, providing a subtle frame that enhances the visual appeal. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, high-quality set suitable for public parks, urban plazas, or recreational spaces.
description: A wooden chessboard with a classic black-and-white checkered pattern, framed by a dark wood border and populated with traditional chess pieces in black and ivory.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full chessboard with all pieces in starting positions, highlighting the black pieces closest and the wood grain border.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the alignment of the chess pieces and the thickness of the wooden board, with the alternating squares visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with the white pieces in the foreground, providing a clear look at the board's checkered pattern and the back row of white pieces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of both sets of pieces and the layered construction of the board's base.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of perfectly square tiles arranged in an 8x8 matrix, alternating between solid black and white squares. The squares are sharply defined with no decorative inlays or embellishments, and the grid is centered within a wide, dark wood border that frames the board.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, raised frame made of dark, polished wood with a visible natural grain pattern. It is smooth, unadorned, and slightly beveled, providing a clean and elegant outline to the playing area without any inscriptions or additional ornamentation.
